failure_modes.text: Isolated facts stay inert when they are not connected to a larger pattern that makes them usable.
failure_modes.source_quote: facts are unusable unless they hang together
failure_modes.mitigation: Hang facts on a latticework of theory by actively connecting them to multiple mental models; isolated data becomes usable only when it reveals a structural relationship.

failure_modes.text: The first compelling analogy can become a false proof if no one checks whether the underlying structure really matches.
failure_modes.source_quote: surface similarity mistaken for structural match
failure_modes.mitigation: Validate each association by checking whether the causal mechanism transfers, not just the surface pattern; line up assumptions and test each for fit.

failure_modes.text: Anchoring on one association hides the rest of the system and misimports the wrong category logic.
failure_modes.mitigation: Deliberately test the association from a different discipline's frame; if a social frame on a business problem or vice versa yields a different conclusion, the original association was too narrow.

premortem_questions.text: Which structural variable made our favorite analogy work, and does that variable really match here?
premortem_questions.source_quote: Which structural variable made the source analogy work in the first place

premortem_questions.text: What important relationship would disappear if our current association turned out to be wrong?
premortem_questions.source_quote: What critical relationship would disappear if our favorite analogy is wrong

premortem_questions.text: What competing association should we test before acting on the first story that feels right?
premortem_questions.source_quote: what competing association should we test before acting

heuristics.text: Use concept mapping to cluster findings into a higher-level pattern before jumping to a slogan.
Use analogy to create a mental bucket only after checking that the structural fit is real.
Link new information to existing schemas so it becomes usable quickly without pretending the first schema is final.

curation_notes.summary: Chunk set stays close to the source's strongest failure modes, premortem questions, and repeatable heuristics.
donor_drops: Did not widen the chunk surface beyond clearly source-backed failure, premortem, and heuristic material.
open_questions: Some chunk text is compressed for operational reuse, but each item stays traceable to explicit source language.

allies: Relation-rich ally material was left for Wave 3 instead of being smuggled into chunk text.
antagonists: Bias and conflict material stronger as first-order relations was deferred to Wave 3.
structured_tensions: Any higher-order candidacy remains observational only in batch artifacts.
